steps.title: Set up vertex form
steps.content: The object peaks at 1,440 ft when t = 12, so the vertex is (12, 1440). Write f(t) = a(t − 12)² + 1440.

steps.title: Find a using f(0) = 0
steps.content: The object launched from height 0: 0 = a(0 − 12)² + 1440 $\Rightarrow$ 144a = −1440 $\Rightarrow$ a = −10. So f(t) = −10(t − 12)² + 1440.
